name: healthcare_technology_cross_border_southport_tru_loy
premise: A Healthcare Technology response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare technology cross border southport tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Zara Morales
agents.identity: I am Zara Morales, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare Technology when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Gideon Morales
agents.identity: I am Gideon Morales, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare Technology.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Zara Morales must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Zara Morales do?
